fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: Schema
fields.name: schema

fields.description: Filesystem path for the source input or sink output, resolved relative to the run data directory.
fields.label: Path
fields.name: path

fields.description: Sink name for non-conformant rows, or 'discard' for explicit drop
fields.label: On Validation Failure
fields.name: on_validation_failure

fields.description: Explicit normalized column names for headerless tabular input.
fields.label: Columns
fields.name: columns

fields.description: Optional mapping from observed source field names to normalized pipeline field names.
fields.label: Field Mapping
fields.name: field_mapping

fields.description: Single-character delimiter used to split CSV fields.
fields.label: Delimiter
fields.name: delimiter

fields.description: Text encoding used to decode the CSV file.
fields.label: Encoding
fields.name: encoding

fields.description: Number of leading physical rows to skip before reading headers or data.
fields.label: Skip Rows
fields.name: skip_rows
